_publications._publicationTitle: Small Extracellular Vesicles Derived from NF2-Associated Schwannoma Cells Modulate Tumor Progression and Immunity via HSP90.

_contextSnippet: Utilizing the STRING online database (version 11.3) alongside Cytoscape software (version 3.7.2), we meticulously analyzed and visualized the protein-protein interaction (PPI) network, setting a threshold score of >0.9
details: Successfully analyzed and visualized protein-protein interaction (PPI) network with threshold score >0.9, identifying top ten key hub nodes
